jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Vijaya Diagnostics
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Vijaya Diagnostics in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vijaya Diagnostics:
Vijaya Diagnostics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijaya Diagnostics!
